notes: 3.11.14 — SUA HO SO NV: DONG-KHI-BAN co lua chon 💾 LUU ROI DONG (Sep bao 3.11.09 chi canh bao, van mat khi chuyen tab — yeu cau: phai LUU duoc). Nang guard: form dang ky _modalSaveHook (ham Luu cua chinh form) → khi dong-khi-ban hoi 2 buoc: OK=💾 LUU roi dong (ham luu tu validate — loi vd thieu ho ten → toast + O LAI form, khong mat gi); Cancel → hoi tiep: OK=dong bo thay doi / Cancel=o lai.
